feed.author: Jose-Gael-Cruz-Lopez
feed.summary: Implemented Mermaid + D2 rendering in the Docs reader
feed.body: Fenced mermaid and d2 blocks now render to inline SVG on the client, with the source block as a fallback.

feed.author: AndresL230
feed.summary: Switched MCP token comparison to constant-time
feed.body: Replaces the early-return string compare flagged in #138. Adds a timing test that fails on the old implementation.

feed.author: lpcooper-arch
feed.summary: Drafted ADR: append-only feed as the system of record

feed.author: AndresL230
feed.summary: Structured My Work summaries land at capture time
feed.body: PRs summarize into title/what/why/impact and issues into title/summary/next_step. The card layout renders the structured fields; the old What-changed regex is gone.

feed.author: Darkest-Teddy
feed.summary: Widened captured event raw with PR base.ref and issue milestone
feed.body: The webhook now records the PR base branch and the issue milestone title/due_on so My Work cards can show them without a live GitHub call.

feed.author: Jose-Gael-Cruz-Lopez
feed.summary: Roadmap FTS so query() stops being roadmap-blind
feed.body: Standalone roadmap_fts over the plan narrative + milestones. Search now surfaces roadmap items alongside docs, decisions, and feed.

feed.author: AndresL230
feed.body: A cron recomputes milestone progress off the render path when a webhook delivery is missed. Absolute closed/total so delivery order is irrelevant.

feed.author: lpcooper-arch
feed.summary: Identity triage queue for unmapped GitHub logins
feed.body: Each unknown login on a captured event raises one pending identity task. The map-to-person route performs the people table's only runtime write.

feed.author: Darkest-Teddy
feed.summary: Sapling lesson previews render in CI comments
feed.body: The content Action posts a rendered preview of changed MDX lessons as a PR comment. Broken internal links now fail the check.

feed.author: Jose-Gael-Cruz-Lopez
feed.summary: Sapling API adds /progress with per-learner JWT
feed.body: Learners can read their own progress with a scoped token. Rate limited to 120 req/min; responses carry ETags.

feed.author: AndresL230
feed.summary: Local dev seed wired across every surface
feed.body: npm run seed loads JSON fixtures into local D1 so My Work, Feed, Docs, Roadmap, Triage, and Search all light up as the DEV_LOGIN user.

feed.author: Darkest-Teddy
feed.summary: Milestone progress bars on the Roadmap page
feed.body: Each milestone renders a closed/total bar from the stored cache. No live GitHub at render.

feed.author: lpcooper-arch
feed.summary: Docs space toggle: Sapling vs Canopy
feed.body: The Docs reader gains a top-level space toggle. Grouping and display only, not an access boundary.

feed.author: Jose-Gael-Cruz-Lopez
feed.summary: Sapling streaks moved to Durable Objects
feed.body: Per-learner streak counters now live in a Durable Object keyed by learner id, replacing the racy KV counter.
